claim: Red teaming must evaluate full interaction dynamics not just input/output pairs for agents
actionable: Design agent tests with multi-turn conversations and user persona simulation

claim: LLM-as-judge framework is insufficient for testing agents - need multi-turn and dynamic evaluation
actionable: Use specialized red-teaming tools like Giskard that simulate user personas for agent testing

claim: Tool call inputs and outputs are common failure points in agent systems
actionable: Pay special attention to validating tool call construction and handling in agent tests
